name: 黄巾之乱
description: 184年，Yellow Turban Rebellion: The Yellow Turbans ravage the north and east and are defeated

name: 凉州之乱
description: 184年，Liang Province rebellion: A rebellion occurs in Liang province (Liangzhou; 涼州; roughly present-day Wuwei, Gansu)

name: The imperial palace is damaged by fire and special taxes are levied for rebuilding
description: 185年，帝宫被火灾损毁，朝廷征收特别税进行重建。

name: Governors are appointed to unify provincial administrations
description: 188年，朝廷任命州牧统一各州行政管理。

name: Emperor Ling of Han去世
description: 189年，汉灵帝驾崩，何皇后与其兄何进拥立刘辩并建立摄政政府。

name: 十常侍之乱
description: 189年，The Ten Eunuchs kill He Jin and are themselves massacred by Yuan Shao; Dong Zhuo takes control of Luoyang and deposes Liu Bian in favor of his half-brother Liu Xie, Emperor Xian of Han

name: 讨伐董卓
description: 189年，Campaign against Dong Zhuo: An anti-Dong Zhuo alliance forms in the east, led by Yuan Shao

name: Dong Zhuo burns Luoyang, loots the imperials tombs, and relocates to Chang'an
description: 190年，Dong Zhuo burns Luoyang, loots the imperials tombs, and relocates to Chang'an

name: 荥阳之战
description: 190年，Battle of Xingyang: Dong Zhuo defeated Cao Cao at Xingyang, Henan

name: The Coalition breaks up and local officials set themselves up as warlords
description: 190年，讨董联盟瓦解，各地官员割据自立。

name: 阳城之战
description: 191年，Battle of Yangcheng: Battle between Yuan Shao and Yuan Shu

name: 襄阳之战
description: 191年，Battle of Xiangyang: Sun Jian dies.

name: Zhang Lu sets up a theocracy in Hanzhong.
description: 191年，Zhang Lu sets up a theocracy in Hanzhong.

name: 长安之战
description: 192年，Battle of Chang'an: Wang Yun and Lü Bu kill Dong Zhuo and Wang Yun himself is killed by Dong Zhuo's officers Li Jue and Guo Si

name: The Han dynasty scholar Cai Yong去世
description: 192年，东汉学者蔡邕去世。

name: 曹操征徐州
description: 193年，Cao Cao's invasion of Xu Province: Liu Bei first territory as a result of Cao Cao's campaign.

name: Yan Province之战
description: 194年，Battle of Yan Province: Cao Cao takes over Yan Province.

name: Emperor Xian of Han escapes from Chang'an
description: 195年，Emperor Xian of Han escapes from Chang'an

name: 孙策平定江东
description: 195年，Sun Ce sets up south of the Changjiang, Sun Ce's conquests in Jiangdong begin.

name: Emperor Xian of Han relocates to Xuchang under Cao Cao's control
description: 196年，Emperor Xian of Han relocates to Xuchang under Cao Cao's control

name: 讨伐袁术
description: 197年，Campaign against Yuan Shu: Yuan Shu takes the imperial title but is driven south by Cao Cao

name: War between Cao Cao and Zhang Xiu begin.
description: 197年，War between Cao Cao and Zhang Xiu begin.

name: 下邳之战
description: 199年，Battle of Xiapi: Cao Cao and Liu Bei defeated Lu Bu.

name: 易京之战
description: 199年，Battle of Yijing: Yuan Shao eliminates Gongsun Zan in You Province.

name: Yuan Shu去世
description: 199年，袁术去世。

name: 官渡之战
description: 200年，Battle of Guandu: Yuan Shao is defeated by Cao Cao northeast of modern Zhongmou, Henan

name: Sun Ce去世
description: 200年，Sun Ce dies and is succeeded by his brother Sun Quan

name: Zheng Xuan去世
description: 200年，经学大师郑玄去世。

name: Yuan Shao去世
description: 202年，Yuan Shao dies and is succeeded by his younger son Yuan Shang

name: 博望之战
description: 202年，Battle of Bowang: Liu Bei defeats Cao Cao at Bowang (near present-day Fancheng District, Hubei)

name: Cao Cao's campaigns to unify northern China begin
description: 203年，Cao Cao's campaigns to unify northern China begin

name: Xiakou之战
description: 203年，Battle of Xiakou: Battle between the warlords Sun Quan and Liu Biao

name: 白狼山之战
description: 207年，Battle of White Wolf Mountain: Cao Cao defeats Yuan Shang and the Wuhuan, Cao Cao unites northern China

name: 江夏之战
description: 208年，Battle of Jiangxia: Sun Quan defeats Liu Biao and beheads Huang Zu

name: Zhuge Liang advises Liu Bei, Liu Biao去世
description: 208年，Zhuge Liang advises Liu Bei, Liu Biao dies, Cao Cao takes over Jing Province.

name: 长坂坡之战
description: 208年，Battle of Changban: Zhao Yun rescues Liu Shan, Liu Bei escapes to Xiakou.

name: 赤壁之战
description: 208年，Battle of Red Cliffs: Cao Cao is defeated on Changjiang, west of modern Jiangxia, Hubei, by Sun Quan and Liu Bei

name: Liu Bei occupies the south of Jing Province
description: 210年，Liu Bei occupies the south of Jing Province

name: 潼关之战
description: 211年，Battle of Tong Pass: Cao Cao defeats Ma Chao and Han Sui and starts campaigning in northwestern China

name: 刘备入蜀
description: 211年，Liu Bei's takeover of Yi Province: Liu Zhang invites Liu Bei to Yi Province (covering present-day Sichuan and Chongqing)

name: 刘备入蜀
description: 214年，Liu Bei's takeover of Yi Province: Liu Bei takes control of Yi Province from Liu Zhang

name: Yangping之战
description: 215年，Battle of Yangping: Zhang Lu surrenders Hanzhong to Cao Cao

name: Cao Cao declares himself King of Wei
description: 216年，Cao Cao declares himself King of Wei

name: 定军山之战
description: 219年，Battle of Mount Dingjun: Liu Bei defeats and slays Cao Cao's general Xiahou Yuan and takes Hanzhong

name: Liu Bei becomes King of Hanzhong
description: 219年，Liu Bei becomes King of Hanzhong

name: 樊城之战
description: 219年，Battle of Fancheng: Liu Bei's general Guan Yu attacks north in Jing Province

name: 吕蒙袭荆州
description: 219年，Lü Meng's invasion of Jing Province: Sun Quan's general Lü Meng attacks Guan Yu and seizes the south of Jing Province

name: Guan Yu被杀
description: 220年，Guan Yu is executed by Sun Quan.

name: Cao Cao去世
description: 220年，Cao Cao dies at Luoyang and is succeeded by his son Cao Pi.

name: The Nine-rank system is implemented.
description: 220年，九品中正制开始实施。

name: Cao Pi forces Emperor Xian of Han to abdicate and declares himself Emperor of the Wei dynasty; so ends the Han dynasty.
description: 220年，Cao Pi forces Emperor Xian of Han to abdicate and declares himself Emperor of the Wei dynasty; so ends the Han dynasty.

name: Liu Bei declares himself emperor of Han.
description: 221年，Liu Bei declares himself emperor of Han.

name: 夷陵之战
description: 222年，Battle of Xiaoting: Liu Bei is defeated by Sun Quan's general Lu Xun.

name: 曹丕伐吴
description: 222年，Cao Pi's invasions of Eastern Wu: Sun Quan declares independence from Cao Wei; Cao Pi invades Eastern Wu.

name: 曹丕伐吴
description: 223年，Cao Pi's invasions of Eastern Wu: Sun Quan's forces repel Cao Wei.

name: Liu Bei去世
description: 223年，Liu Bei dies and is succeeded by Liu Shan.

name: 广陵之役
description: 225年，Incident at Guangling: Cao Pi attempts to invade Sun Quan's territory but later withdraws without fighting.

name: 诸葛亮南征
description: 225年，Zhuge Liang's Southern Campaign: Zhuge Liang conquers Nanzhong.

name: Cao Pi去世
description: 226年，Cao Pi dies and is succeeded by Cao Rui.

name: The Jiaozhou warlord, Shi Xie去世
description: 226年，交州军阀士燮去世，孙权将交州部分地区设为广州。

name: Sun Quan quells Shi Hui's rebellion and seizes Jiaozhou; Sun Quan abolishes Guangzhou.
description: 227年，东吴重新设立广州。

name: Zhuge Liang presents the Chu Shi Biao to Liu Shan.
description: 227年，诸葛亮向刘禅上《出师表》。

name: 新城之叛
description: 228年，Xincheng Rebellion: Sima Yi quells Meng Da's rebellion.

name: 诸葛亮北伐
description: 228年，Zhuge Liang's Northern Expeditions: Zhuge Liang's first northern expedition against Cao Wei; Ma Su is defeated by Zhang He.

name: 石亭之战
description: 228年，Battle of Shiting: Lu Xun defeats Cao Wei forces led by Cao Xiu.

name: 诸葛亮北伐
description: 229年，Zhuge Liang's Northern Expeditions: Zhuge Liang's second northern expedition. He is forced to retreat due to arrival of Cao Wei reinforcements.

name: Sun Quan proclaims himself "Emperor of Wu" in Jianye (Nanjing); Wu enters an alliance with Shu Han.
description: 229年，Sun Quan proclaims himself "Emperor of Wu" in Jianye (Nanjing); Wu enters an alliance with Shu Han.

name: 诸葛亮北伐
description: 229年，Zhuge Liang's Northern Expeditions: Zhuge Liang captures Wudu (武都; near present-day Cheng County, Gansu) and Yinping (陰平; present-day Wen County, Gansu) on his third northern expedition.

name: Eastern Wu expedition troops land on a legendary island known as Yizhou where most of them die but manage to bring back "several thousand" natives back to China.
description: 230年，Eastern Wu expedition troops land on a legendary island known as Yizhou where most of them die but manage to bring back "several thousand" natives back to China.

name: 子午谷之战
description: 230年，Ziwu Campaign: Cao Wei forces led by Cao Zhen invade Shu Han but later retreated.

name: Zhuge Liang invents the wooden ox.
description: 231年，诸葛亮发明木牛流马。

name: 诸葛亮北伐
description: 231年，Zhuge Liang's Northern Expeditions: Zhuge Liang's fourth northern expedition. He is forced to withdraw after provisions are exhausted, but managed to kill Zhang He during his retreat.

name: 合肥之战
description: 231年，Battle of Hefei: Sun Quan is repelled by Man Chong; Wang Ling is ambushed by Eastern Wu forces.

name: The Cao Wei poet, Cao Zhi去世
description: 232年，曹魏诗人曹植去世。

name: Sun Quan sends an envoy to Gongsun Yuan in the northeast, but the envoy被杀
description: 233年，Sun Quan sends an envoy to Gongsun Yuan in the northeast, but the envoy is killed and brought to Cao Wei
result: the envoy is killed and brought to Cao Wei

name: 合肥之战
description: 233年，Battle of Hefei: Sun Quan is repelled by Man Chong.

name: Emperor Xian of Han去世
description: 234年，汉献帝刘协去世。

name: 五丈原之战
description: 234年，Battle of Wuzhang Plains: Zhuge Liang dies on his fifth and last northern expedition against Cao Wei; Jiang Wan succeeds Zhuge Liang.

name: 合肥之战
description: 234年，Battle of Hefei: Sun Quan commands his last attack on Hefei but is repelled by Man Chong.

name: Zhuge Ke campaigns against the Shanyue people of Danyang Commandery.
description: 234年，Zhuge Ke campaigns against the Shanyue people of Danyang Commandery.

name: Cao Wei assassinates the Xianbei chieftain, Kebineng.
description: 235年，曹魏刺杀鲜卑首领轲比能。

name: The Cao Wei mechanical engineer, Ma Jun invents the south-pointing chariot.
description: 235年，曹魏机械工程师马钧发明指南车。

name: Gongsun Yuan declares himself King of Yan.
description: 237年，Gongsun Yuan declares himself King of Yan.

name: Zhuge Ke completes his subjugation of the Shanyue.
description: 237年，Zhuge Ke completes his subjugation of the Shanyue.

name: Cao Wei receives envoys from Himiko of Yamatai.
description: 238年，曹魏接待倭国卑弥呼使者。

name: 司马懿征辽东
description: 238年，Sima Yi's Liaodong campaign: Sima Yi kills Gongsun Yuan and annexes his territory.

name: Cao Rui去世
description: 239年，Cao Rui dies and is succeeded by Cao Fang but real power is wielded by the co-regents Sima Yi and Cao Shuang.
result: real power is wielded by the co-regents Sima Yi and Cao Shuang.

name: Beginning of the Zhengshi reign era (240–249) in Cao Wei; philosophical movements such as Xuanxue and Qingtan as well as the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove emerge in Wei during the era.
description: 240年，曹魏正始年间（240-249），玄学、清谈等哲学运动兴起，竹林七贤活跃于此时期。

name: 姜维北伐
description: 240年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's first northern expedition against Cao Wei.

name: 芍陂之战
description: 241年，Battle of Quebei and Fancheng: Eastern Wu attacks Cao Wei in Yangzhou and Jingzhou but later withdraws.

name: Sun Quan's heir apparent, Sun Deng,去世
description: 241年，孙权太子孙登去世。

name: Sun He becomes Crown Prince of Eastern Wu; Sun He and Sun Ba compete to become Sun Quan's heir apparent, splitting the Wu court into two factions.
description: 242年，孙和被立为东吴太子，与孙霸争位，吴廷分裂为两派。

name: 魏征高句丽
description: 242年，Goguryeo–Wei War: Goguryeo raids Cao Wei at Xi'anping (西安平; near present-day Dandong, Liaoning).

name: 兴势之战
description: 244年，Battle of Xingshi: Cao Wei forces led by Cao Shuang are repelled by Shu Han.

name: 魏征高句丽
description: 244年，Goguryeo–Wei War: Cao Wei general Guanqiu Jian defeats Goguryeo, taking Gungnae.

name: 魏征高句丽
description: 245年，Goguryeo–Wei War: Guanqiu Jian sends his armies to pursue Dongcheon of Goguryeo and subjugate Eastern Ye.

name: The Eastern Wu Imperial Chancellor, Lu Xun去世
description: 245年，东吴丞相陆逊去世。

name: Baekje attacks Cao Wei forces at Lelang and Daifang commanderies but later sues for peace.
description: 246年，百济进攻曹魏乐浪、带方二郡，后求和。

name: Jiang Wan and Dong Yun去世
description: 246年，Jiang Wan and Dong Yun dies; Fei Yi and Chen Zhi succeeds Jiang Wan and Dong Yun respectively.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 247年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's second northern expedition.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 248年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's third northern expedition.

name: Lady Triệu leads Viet rebels in Jiaozhou but is defeated by Eastern Wu.
description: 248年，Lady Triệu leads Viet rebels in Jiaozhou but is defeated by Eastern Wu.

name: 高平陵之变
description: 249年，Incident at the Gaoping Tombs: Sima Yi kills Cao Shuang and He Yan, taking over the Cao Wei government.

name: The Cao Wei philosopher, Wang Bi去世
description: 249年，曹魏哲学家王弼去世。

name: 姜维北伐
description: 249年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's fourth northern expedition.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 250年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's fifth northern expedition.

name: Sun Quan exiles Sun He and kills Sun Ba; Sun Liang is installed as Crown Prince.
description: 250年，孙权流放孙和、赐死孙霸，立孙亮为太子。

name: 寿春三叛
description: 251年，Three Rebellions in Shouchun: Sima Yi quells Wang Ling's Rebellion.

name: Sima Yi去世
description: 251年，Sima Yi dies and his son Sima Shi succeeds him.

name: Sima Shi gains the title of "Great General".
description: 252年，司马师获封大将军。

name: Sun Quan去世
description: 252年，孙权去世，孙亮继位，诸葛恪摄政。

name: 东兴之战
description: 253年，Battle of Dongxing: Zhuge Ke defeats Cao Wei forces at Dongxing

name: Fei Yi被杀
description: 253年，费祎被刺杀，姜维继任。

name: 合肥之战
description: 253年，Battle of Hefei: Eastern Wu forces led by Zhuge Ke are repelled by Cao Wei.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 253年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's sixth northern expedition.

name: Sun Jun and Sun Chen kill Zhuge Ke; Sun Jun assumes regency.
description: 253年，Sun Jun and Sun Chen kill Zhuge Ke; Sun Jun assumes regency.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 254年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei captures Didao (狄道; around present-day Lintao County, Gansu), Heguan (河關; in the vicinity of present-day Dingxi, Gansu)  and Lintao on his seventh northern expedition.

name: Sima Shi deposes Cao Fang and replaces him with Cao Mao
description: 254年，Sima Shi deposes Cao Fang and replaces him with Cao Mao

name: 寿春三叛
description: 255年，Three Rebellions in Shouchun: Sima Shi quells Guanqiu Jian and Wen Qin's Rebellion.

name: Sima Shi去世
description: 255年，Sima Shi dies and his brother Sima Zhao takes over.

name: 狄道之战
description: 255年，Battle of Didao: Jiang Wei is defeated by Cao Wei forces in his eight northern expedition; Shu Han loses territorial gains from Jiang Wei's seventh expedition.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 256年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's ninth northern expedition.

name: Sun Jun去世
description: 256年，Sun Jun dies; Sun Chen assumes regency.

name: The Cao Wei scholar, Wang Su去世
description: 256年，曹魏学者王肃去世。

name: 寿春三叛
description: 257年，Three Rebellions in Shouchun: The Cao Wei general, Zhuge Dan rebels in Shouchun.

name: 姜维北伐
description: 257年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei's tenth northern expedition.

name: 寿春三叛
description: 258年，Three Rebellions in Shouchun: Sima Zhao quells Zhuge Dan's Rebellion.

name: Sun Liang is deposed by Sun Chen and Sun Xiu succeeds him.
description: 258年，Sun Liang is deposed by Sun Chen and Sun Xiu succeeds him.

name: Chen Zhi去世
description: 258年，陈祗去世，其盟友宦官黄皓开始把持蜀汉朝政。

name: Sun Xiu kills Sun Chen.
description: 259年，孙休诛杀孙綝。

name: 魏征高句丽
description: 259年，Goguryeo–Wei War: Cao Wei forces are defeated by Goguryeo at Yangmaenggok.

name: Sima Zhao’s Regicide
description: 260年，司马昭弑杀曹髦，改立曹奂。

name: Sun Liang去世
description: 260年，孙亮去世。

name: The Tuoba-Xianbei chieftain, Tuoba Liwei submits to Cao Wei.
description: 261年，拓跋鲜卑首领拓跋力微归附曹魏。

name: 姜维北伐
description: 262年，Jiang Wei's Northern Expeditions: Jiang Wei launches his eleventh and final northern expedition.

name: Sima Zhao kills Ji Kang, one of the Seven Sages of the Bamboo Grove.
description: 262年，司马昭杀嵇康（竹林七贤之一）。

name: 交州之战
description: 263年，Jiao Province Campaign: Viet people in Jiaozhou (Northern Vietnam) under Lã Hưng revolted against Eastern Wu. Cao Wei (later the Western Jin) sends armies to aid the rebels.

name: 魏灭蜀之战
description: 263年，Conquest of Shu by Wei: Liu Shan surrenders to Sima Zhao; so ends Shu Han.

name: Cao Wei establishes Liangzhou (梁州).
description: 264年，曹魏设立梁州。

name: 钟会之乱
description: 264年，Zhong Hui's Rebellion: Zhong Hui and Jiang Wei rebel in Chengdu but are killed by mutineers.

name: 永安之围
description: 264年，Siege of Yong'an: Luo Xian repels Eastern Wu forces from claiming former Shu Han territories.

name: Sima Zhao declares himself King of Jin.
description: 264年，Sima Zhao declares himself King of Jin.

name: Eastern Wu re-establishes Guangzhou.
description: 264年，东吴重新设立广州。

name: Sun Xiu去世
description: 264年，孙休去世，孙皓继位。

name: Sima Zhao去世
description: 265年，司马昭去世，司马炎继位。

name: Sima Yan deposes Cao Huan and declares himself emperor of the Western Jin dynasty, so ends Cao Wei.
description: 266年，司马炎废曹奂，建立西晋，曹魏灭亡。

name: Eastern Wu attacks Western Jin on multiple fronts but is repelled; Lâm Ấp and Funan send tributes to Jin.
description: 268年，Eastern Wu attacks Western Jin on multiple fronts but is repelled; Lâm Ấp and Funan send tributes to Jin.
result: is repelled; Lâm Ấp and Funan send tributes to Jin.

name: 交州之战
description: 269年，Jiao Province Campaign: Eastern Wu launches counteroffensive into Jiaozhou.

name: Western Jin establishes Qinzhou.
description: 269年，Western Jin establishes Qinzhou.

name: 秃发树机能之乱
description: 270年，Tufa Shujineng's Rebellion: Tufa Shujineng leads tribal rebellion against Western Jin in Qinzhou and Liangzhou (涼州).

name: The Shu Han scholar, Qiao Zhou去世
description: 270年，蜀汉学者谯周去世。

name: Liu Shan去世
description: 271年，蜀后主刘禅去世。

name: 交州之战
description: 271年，Jiao Province Campaign: Eastern Wu recaptures Jiaozhou from Western Jin.

name: Western Jin quells Xiongnu rebellion in Bingzhou.
description: 272年，西晋平定并州匈奴叛乱。

name: 西陵之战
description: 272年，Battle of Xiling: Eastern Wu forces led by Lu Kang defeat Western Jin and recapture Xiling (in present-day Xiling District, Hubei)

name: Cao Fang去世
description: 274年，曹芳去世。

name: 秃发树机能之乱
description: 275年，秃发树机能投降西晋。

name: 秃发树机能之乱
description: 277年，秃发树机能再次叛乱。

name: 秃发树机能之乱
description: 279年，Tufa Shujineng's Rebellion: Tufa Shujineng captures Liangzhou; Western Jin forces led by Ma Long quells the rebellion.

name: 晋灭吴之战
description: 279年，Conquest of Wu by Jin: Western Jin begins its conquest of Eastern Wu.

name: 晋灭吴之战
description: 280年，Conquest of Wu by Jin: Sun Hao surrenders to Western Jin; so ends Eastern Wu and the Three Kingdoms period.
result: so ends Eastern Wu and the Three Kingdoms period.
